name: Elvis Presley Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
2. Thoroughly cream together sugar and butter.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Mix in half the flour, then the whipping cream, then the remaining flour.
5. Add vanilla.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan.
7. Set in cold oven and turn heat to 350°F.
8. Bake for 60-70 minutes, until a sharp knife inserted in cake comes out clean.
9. Cool in pan for 5 minutes.
10. Remove from pan and cool thoroughly.
